items.title: Guidance: Commercial Payments Bill: factsheets
items.summary: Further details on the measures included within the Commercial Payments Bill.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Energy trends and prices: March - May 2027
items.summary: Monthly production, trade, electricity generation and consumption of coal, electricity, gas, oil and total energy; retail price and EU comparative price data, and petrol & diesel price data.

items.summary: Weekly prices of unleaded petrol and diesel.

items.summary: Weekly prices of unleaded petrol and diesel.

items.summary: Weekly prices of unleaded petrol and diesel.

items.summary: Weekly prices of unleaded petrol and diesel.

items.title: Decision: Project Union: East Coast - section 35 direction, Planning Act 2008
items.summary: Direction by the Secretary of State on the Project Union: East Coast.

items.title: Policy paper: Fair Work Agency: enforcement policy statement
items.summary: The regulatory tools and guiding structures utilised by the Fair Work Agency to enforce labour market legislation within its remit.

items.title: Notice: Low Carbon Hydrogen Supply 2 competition: successful projects
items.summary: The Low Carbon Hydrogen Supply Competition aimed to provide funding for projects that could help develop a wide range of innovative low-carbon hydrogen supply solutions.

items.title: Companies House sets out priorities for the business year
items.summary: The agency’s business plan 2026 to 2027 marks a key step in its transformation, strengthening its position as a trusted guardian of corporate data.

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade union statistics 2025
items.summary: Provides information on trade union membership among employees in the UK estimated from the Labour Force Survey over the period 1995 to 2025.

items.title: Military end-use controls
items.summary: When military end-use export controls apply and to which destinations.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Weekly road fuel prices
items.summary: Road fuel price statistics providing average UK retail 'pump' prices on a weekly basis.

items.title: Largest crackdown on late payments in over 25 years as landmark Bill enters Parliament
items.summary: Ministers announce the introduction of legislation to tackle late payments and protect small businesses.

items.title: Largest ever UK business delegation to the US launches Greater Together Los Angeles
items.summary: The Secretary of State for Culture, Lisa Nandy and Minister for Economic Transformation, Blair McDougall, will today lead a delegation of 250+ strong business and cultural leaders to the US to drive economic growth at a major expo, Greater Together LA.

items.title: Guidance: Overseas business risk for Ethiopia
items.summary: Information on key security and political risks which UK businesses may face when operating in Ethiopia.

items.title: Guidance: Trade union political funds
items.summary: Guidance on how a trade union political fund must be operated.

items.title: Oil and gas: offshore environmental legislation
items.summary: Environmental regulations and guidance on offshore oil and gas exploration and production offshore gas unloading and storage and offshore carbon dioxide storage activities

items.title: Official Statistics: UK trade in numbers
items.summary: A snapshot of the UK’s latest trade and investment position, summarising statistics produced by ONS, DBT, and UNCTAD.

items.title: Notice: Bill discount scheme: administrator update
items.summary: Ofgem has been appointed as the scheme administrator for the bill discount scheme.

items.title: Guidance: Business Support Service: privacy notice
items.summary: How the Department for Business and Trade (DBT) will use your personal data when you contact the Business Support Service, and what your rights are.

items.title: Notice: Smart Secure Electricity Systems (SSES) tariff interoperability: code and licence modifications
items.summary: The Secretary of State has made changes to Electricity Supply Standard Licence Conditions and the Retail Energy Code using his power under section 245(1)(a) and (e) of the Energy Act 2023.

items.title: Notice: Carbon Capture, Usage and Storage (CCUS) Innovation 2.0 programme: successful projects
items.summary: This programme aims to accelerate the deployment of next generation carbon capture, usage and storage (CCUS) technology in the UK to be deployed at scale by 2030.

items.title: Research: CCUS Innovation 2.0 competition: UNICORN - Efficient MOF based pilot unit for CO2 filtration
items.summary: Key documents from the University of Sheffield’s Carbon Capture, Usage and Storage (CCUS) Innovation 2.0 project.

items.title: Research: CCUS Innovation 2.0 competition: MONET - MOF-based negative emissions technology
items.summary: Key documents from Promethean Particles Limited’s Carbon Capture, Usage and Storage (CCUS) Innovation 2.0 project.

items.title: Research: Regulator dashboard
items.summary: Information and key performance indicators (KPIs) from 16 UK regulators, published quarterly as part of the UK government’s Regulatory Action Plan.

items.title: Promotional material: Employment Rights Act 2025: factsheets
items.summary: Further details on the measures included within the Employment Rights Act 2025.

items.title: Form: Department for Business and Trade College of Experts: registration of interest
items.summary: The Department for Business and Trade (DBT) is establishing a new College of Experts (CoE) and is inviting external specialists to register their interest joining the network.

items.title: Letting out a self-catering holiday home in England: rules and regulations
items.summary: Regulations you need to follow when letting out a self-catering, short-term holiday home in England.

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade and investment core statistics book
items.summary: A monthly snapshot of the UK’s trade and investment position, summarising trade statistics produced by ONS, HMRC, DBT and others.

items.title: Guidance: Local net zero: support for local authorities and communities
items.summary: Central government provides a range of support to help local authorities and communities to decarbonise.

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade and investment factsheets: latest update
items.summary: The most up to date snapshot of the UK’s trade and investment positions with trading partners overseas.

items.title: Decision: North Falls Offshore Wind Farm: development consent order, Planning Act 2008
items.summary: Decision on an application for an offshore wind farm by North Falls Offshore Wind Farm Limited.

items.title: Notice: Energy code manager standard licence conditions: determination notice
items.summary: The Secretary of State has determined the code manager standard licence conditions for the purposes of Sections 33(1) and 81(2) of the Utilities Act 2000.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Household Energy Efficiency Headline Release (quarterly data)
items.summary: Headline Household Energy Efficiency statistics under the Energy Company Obligation (ECO) and the Green Deal Framework.

items.title: Notice: Heat Pump Investment Accelerator Competition: round 2
items.summary: This competition provides grant funding for investments in the manufacture of heat pumps and strategically important heat pump components in the UK.

items.title: Official Statistics: Boiler Upgrade Scheme: April 2026
items.summary: Data monitoring the uptake of low carbon technologies on the Boiler Upgrade Scheme (BUS), including the installation of air source heat pumps, ground source heat pumps and biomass boilers.

items.title: Make Work Pay: misuse of non-disclosure agreements (NDAs)
items.summary: We are seeking views on proposals to prevent the misuse of non-disclosure agreements in cases of workplace harassment and discrimination.

items.title: Bill that could nationalise British Steel takes first step through Parliament
items.summary: The Steel Industry (Nationalisation) Bill will take its first step through Parliament today with its First Reading.

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade and investment factsheets (partner names beginning with W to Z)
items.summary: A snapshot of the UK’s trade and investment positions with individual trading and investment partners overseas, for partners whose name begins with W, X, Y or Z.
